name: SharpHound PowerShell Detected
notes: This rule triggers when a SharpHound PowerShell script is run. The primary function used in the script is named "invoke-BloodHound".
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?invoke-bloodhound.*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY SharpHound PowerShell Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?invoke-bloodhound.*' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects when the SharpHound PowerShell script is run.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
